title: New Tools for Monitoring and Modeling Hydrological Processes in Small Agricultural Watersheds
abstract: Integrated watershed management is regarded as the most appropriatestrategy to rehabilitate fragile ecosystems and improve the livelihoods ofpeople living in rain-fed areas. The rural people living in such areas areunder constant threat of low yields, unemployment and consequentlypoor living conditions. Effective watershed management can substantiallyreduce risks, make water for drinking and cultivation available in anequitable manner, increase farm productivity and raise income through...........
